hero.title: Reuniting lost pets with their families
hero.subtitle: Report, search and share. Together we find your companion.

step1.title: 1. Post
step1.description: Upload photos, description and the last location where your pet was seen.

step2.title: 2. Search the map
step2.description: Explore nearby reports on the interactive map. Filter by type, breed and location.

step3.title: 3. Share
step3.description: Share on WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook and Twitter to maximize the search.

home.noReports: No recent reports in your area

cta.title: Lost your pet?
cta.subtitle: Post a report now and reach thousands of people in your area.

create.title: Add location report
create.clickMap: Click on the map to mark the location
create.noCoord: Select a location on the map before continuing
create.noFutureDate: Date cannot be in the future

shelters.title: Shelters & Organizations
shelters.description: These are local shelters working to rescue and protect animals. If you want to help, visit their pages to donate directly to them.
shelters.empty: No shelters available at the moment.
shelters.contactCta: Are you a shelter and want to appear here? Contact us.

footer.description: SearchPet — helping reunite pets with their families.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for the pets of Uruguay
footer.contactText: Want to contribute? This is an open source project.

map.title: Reports map
map.clickToReport: Click on the map to add a report

profile.title: My profile
profile.name: Full name
profile.phoneHint: Visible to people who want to contact you about a pet

otp.title: Verify phone
otp.stepPhoneDesc: Enter your phone number and we'll send you an SMS code.
otp.stepCodeDesc: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {{phone}}.
otp.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait 60 seconds before resending.
otp.errorMaxAttempts: You've reached the 5-attempt limit. Request a new code.
